conversion_notes: RGB values were assembled from separate CSV columns: red, green, and blue.
The source CSV misspells the blue header as 'Featuer Color Blue'; this conversion preserves that source header while normalizing the output.
This JSON is designated as the authoritative source of truth for what colors on the DM map represent.
